'''Dania''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] and the lover of [[Surl]], a corrupt customs agent and undercover [[Spy/Legends|spy]]. She was corrupt, and had ties to both the [[Black market/Legends|black market]] and, through Surl, several spy networks, including the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]].<ref name="CCW" />

{{Char-stub}}
